summary: Testing completed for Glassmorphic Design, Theme Toggle, and AI Document Access features. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests all successful - ContactsPage, PipelinePage, SettingsPage have dark theme (no bg-white), Theme toggle works in profile dropdown, AI context includes DOCUMENTS section, 'Projets Clients' folder is displayed.

issues: Minor: Console warning about controlled input changing to uncontrolled (React warning)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Glassmorphic design applied to all pages. Theme toggle works via profile dropdown (stores in localStorage as 'alpha-theme'). AI context now includes DOCUMENTS section with file count, folder count, and types. AI actions list_documents and get_document work via /api/ai-enhanced/execute-action endpoint.

glassmorphic_design_contacts.details: ContactsPage has dark theme with transparent backgrounds (bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-xl), no bg-white class

glassmorphic_design_pipeline.details: PipelinePage has dark theme with glassmorphic cards and columns

glassmorphic_design_settings.details: SettingsPage has dark theme with glassmorphic tabs and cards

theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle visible in profile dropdown. Shows 'Thème clair/sombre' with toggle switch. Clicking toggles body class between 'dark' and 'light', stores in localStorage

ai_context_documents.details: GET /api/ai-enhanced/context returns context with '📁 DOCUMENTS:' section including file count, folder count, and file types

ai_list_documents_action.details: POST /api/ai-enhanced/execute-action with action_type='list_documents' returns documents list with optional filters (file_type, folder_name, search)

documents_projets_clients_folder.details: Documents page displays 'Projets Clients' folder. GET /api/file-manager/folders returns folder list including 'Projets Clients'

auth.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns token and user info

ai_enhanced.GET /api/ai-enhanced/context: PASS - Returns context with DOCUMENTS section

contacts_page.glassmorphic_design: PASS - Dark theme with transparent backgrounds, no bg-white

pipeline_page.glassmorphic_design: PASS - Dark theme with glassmorphic cards

settings_page.glassmorphic_design: PASS - Dark theme with glassmorphic tabs

theme_toggle.visibility: PASS - Toggle visible in profile dropdown
